ON CAL FOR JURY TRIAL. AFTER DISCUSSIONS IN CHAMBERS A SETTLEMENT IS REACHED AS TO BOTH ACTIONS. PRESENT WERE: THE COURT; ATNY FOR PLTF C. LEE, KAZ MANIWA; ATNY FOR PLTF LEE AS CROSSDEFT, KARA SMITH; AND ATNY FOR DEFT/CROSSCOMPLTANT GIULIANI, JOHN SPENCER. -DEFT WILL PAY PLTF $10,500; -EACH PARTY TO PAY THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS; -PLTF WILL DISMISS THE COMPLAINT. ALSO: -CROSSCOMPLAINANT WILL DISMISS THE CROSSCOMPLAINT; -CROSSDEFT WILL WAIVE COSTS. ALL ATNYS ARE ADVISED THAT THE CASE WILL BE CALENDARED FOR OSC RE FILING OF SETTLEMENT DOCUMENTS/FILING OF DISML IN DEPT#4.
